top.head: GOTTA TRADE
top.text: IQ Option welcomes the hottest trading asset of the moment — Nintendo stock.

white.text-one: Nintendo is a veteran electronics and software company from Japan. These gaming world originals have recently collaborated with an American software development company Niantic and created a digital phenomenon known as «Pokemon GO». You may have heard about it: this augmented reality game got kids and adults alike scanning the streets for rare pokemons.
white.text-two: Nintendo shares soared just a day after Pokemon GO launched in North America, and they have now risen
white.text-two-end: The game is set to be released globally and the stock price will most likely continue to rally. You don’t want to miss another crazy price spike!
